name: brain-engineering-os
description: Brain Engineering Operating System — an AI engineering team delivered as a Claude Code plugin. Orchestrates CTO Advisor, Architect, Backend/Frontend/Mobile devs, Security, QA, and DevOps agents through an 8-stage requirement-to-release pipeline grounded in the Brain canon (Requirements/BRAIN_BUSINESS.md, BRAIN_TECHNICAL.md, and 54 curated skills).
